headline: Trump рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚі Eyes Greenland GRAB рҹ’Ҙрҹ§Ҡ вҖ“ Military MOONSHOT рҹҡҖрҹ”«?
text:
ORANGE MAN рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј Trump DROPPING BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ў on GREENLAND рҹ§ҠрҹҮ¬рҹҮұ вҖ“ White House spilling TEA вҳ• that Donnie's squad рҹӨңрҹ’Ҙ discussing ALL OPTIONS including MILITARY FLEX рҹ’Әрҹ”Ҙ to SNAG the icy THICCNESS рҹҚ‘вқ„пёҸ! 'National security PRIORITY' they YEET рҹ“Ҳ, cuz ARCTIC HUB рҹҡҖрҹӘ© needed to OWN those RARE EARTHS рҹ’ҺрҹӨ‘ and block PUTIN рҹҗ»рҹҮ·рҹҮә + CHINA рҹҗү commie CREEPS from SLIDING IN рҹҳҸрҹҡ«! Europe SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹҮӘрҹҮә rallying BEHIND DENMARK рҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ UK рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§, France рҹҘ–, Germany рҹҘЁ, Italy рҹҚқ, Poland рҹҘ”, Spain рҹ•ә + Danish MOMMY Mette Frederiksen рҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸпёҸ dropping JOINT STATEMENT рҹ’Ұрҹ“ң: 'Greenland BELONGS to PEOPLES рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹӨқвҖҚрҹ§‘, NO YANKEE INVASION рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҡ«!' Mette WARNED рҹҳӨ: US ATTACK = NATO DED рҹ’Җвҡ°пёҸ вҖ“ allies gotta COLLECTIVELY CLAPBACK рҹ‘ҸрҹҢҚ per UN vibes вңҢпёҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ!

Greenland PM Jens-Frederik Nielsen рҹҳҺрҹ§Ҡ cheering 'RESPECTFUL DIALOGUE рҹ—ЈпёҸвқӨпёҸ' cuz INTERNATIONAL LAW рҹ“ңрҹ”’ says NO to border BULLYING рҹҳЎ! But Trump OVER WEEKEND рҹҺү REPEATED 'WE NEED IT рҹ§Ҡрҹ’Ә' вҖ“ White House TUESDAY: 'Commander-in-Chief GOT MILITARY ON SPEED DIAL рҹ“һрҹ”«!' Stephen Miller рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј + wifey Katie рҹ’… POSTING USA-COLORED MAP рҹ—әпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё with 'SOON' рҹҳҲ вҖ“ bro BRAGGED on CNN: 'Nobody FIGHTS US over GREENIE рҹ§Ҡ вҖ“ it's OFFICIAL US GOV POSITION рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ“ў!' Rubio рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё tells Congress рҹӨ«: NO INVASION PLANS but WANNA BUY рҹӣ’ it like REAL ESTATE DEAL рҹӨ‘рҹҸ  вҖ“ Trump 2019 vibes: 'LARGE ESTATE FLIP рҹ’°!' Or COMPACT FREE ASSOC рҹҶ“рҹӨқ like Pacific islands CHILLIN' рҹҢҙ.

Post-VENEZUELA RAID рҹӘӮрҹ’Ҙ where ELITE TROOPS рҹҺ–пёҸ SNATCHED Maduro рҹӨЎрҹҮ»рҹҮӘ for NYC DRUGGIE TRIAL вҡ–пёҸрҹҡ”, Greenlanders SHAKING рҹҳұ вҖ“ Inuit bro Morgan Angaju рҹ§Ҡрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҰұ: 'TERRIFYING рҹҳЁ hearing FREE WORLD LEADER LAUGHING рҹҳӮ at us like PROPERTY рҹҸ·пёҸ! Kalaallit Nunaat = OUR LAND рҹ—әпёҸрҹҮ¬рҹҮұ!' Polls say 57K peeps HATE joining USA рҹҳӨ вҖ“ want INDEPENDENCE from Denmark рҹҮ©рҹҮ° not YANKEE YOKE вӣ“пёҸ, even with US BASE already THERE рҹҸ°рҹ”«. Senator Schmitt рҹ—ЈпёҸ: 'Strong USA = WESTERN WIN рҹҸҶ вҖ“ Europe WAKE UP вҳ•!'

Denmark FM Lars Lokke Rasmussen рҹ“һ Rubio: 'Clear MISUNDERSTANDINGS рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ!' Hegseth рҹӘ– at hearings: 'PENTAGON PLANS FOR ANY CONTINGENCY рҹ’Ҙрҹ“Ӣ!' Russia/China EYES рҹ‘Җ on MELTING ICE ROUTES рҹҡўвқ„пёҸ + RARE EARTH GOAT рҹҗҗрҹ’Һ вҖ“ Trump March: 'We'll GO AS FAR рҹӣӨпёҸ!' Katie's map = HARBINGER рҹҳҲ, Miller SIMPING HARD рҹӨӨ: NOBODY GONNA STOP US рҹҰ…рҹ’Ё! Europe Cucks рҹҗ”рҹҮӘрҹҮә vs Trump DADDY рҹ‘‘рҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ Arctic ORGY рҹ’Ұрҹ§Ҡ incoming? Greenland SAID 'NAH BRUH' but Donnie THRUSTING в¬ҶпёҸрҹҳ© for that POLAR PUSSY рҹҗұвқ„пёҸ! WSJ/Reuters SPILLING DEETS рҹ“°рҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ NATO DRAMA рҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ, will Donnie YEET troops or just BRIBE рҹӨ‘? STAY TUNED рҹ“әрҹҚҝ!
